results.validation_notes: The existing classification of Microservices (score 1.0) is incorrect. Deep context shows: (1) Single backend Dockerfile in packages/backend/ - not multiple independent services, (2) No Kubernetes manifests or service orchestration, (3) No service discovery config, (4) This is a monorepo with plugins, which is characteristic of a Modular Monolith. The Event-Driven, DDD, and Pipe-and-Filter signals (scores 0.6, 0.3, 0.3) were weak and not confirmed by source structure.
